plugins.name: GitHub Issues
plugins.description: Browse open GitHub issues across your repos (via the gh CLI) or one repo in a searchable, sortable dialog with a repository filter; click one to drop a prompt asking the agent to open and review it. The prompt template is editable in settings.
plugins.author: Cockpit

versions.notes: gh CLI + cross-repo, searchable/sortable dialog with a repository filter (All + per-repo), per-field settings help tooltips.

plugins.name: GitHub Pull Requests
plugins.description: Shows up to 5 open GitHub pull requests inline under the session list (via the gh CLI across your repos, or one repo), plus a dialog listing every open PR in a searchable, sortable grid; click one to drop a prompt asking the agent to review it. The prompt template is editable in settings.
plugins.author: Cockpit

versions.notes: Inline Open PRs section + all-PRs dialog, gh CLI or single-repo HTTP. Hardened JSON parsing; per-field settings help tooltips; settings apply live (no restart).

plugins.name: YouTrack
plugins.description: Connect one or more YouTrack instances and browse their open issues per project over the REST API (permanent token); a dialog with instance/project/state filters lets you narrow down, and clicking an issue drops a prompt asking the agent to work on it. The prompt template is editable in settings.
plugins.author: Cockpit

versions.notes: Multiple YouTrack instances; left-menu button opening a dialog with instance/project/state filters (All). Per-field settings help tooltips; no personal instance baked in.
Single-instance per-project open issues over the YouTrack REST API.
